title: Comida y bebida
description: Vocabulario y frases para comer, beber y pedir alimentos.

items.speaker: Ben
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L18-03 - E1183 - Ben - Would you like a drink.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L32-01 - E1321 - Noah - What's your favorite food.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.translation: Mi comida favorita son los tacos.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L32-02 - E1322 - Ethan - My favorite food is tacos.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.translation: Mi comida favorita es la pasta.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L32-05 - E1325 - Emma - My favorite food is pasta.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L34-02 - E1342 - Ethan - I don't have an umbrella.mp3

items.speaker: Pharmacist
items.translation: Toma esta medicina después de las comidas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L37-05 - E1375 - Pharmacist - Take this medicine after meals.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L48-04 - E1484 - Noah - Will we eat there.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: But the drinks are cheap enough.
items.translation: Pero las bebidas son lo bastante baratas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L13-04 - E2134 - Emma - But the drinks are cheap enough.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Could you bring us some water too?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L14-05 - E2145 - Emma - Could you bring us some water too.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Excuse me, I think this is the wrong drink.
items.translation: Disculpe, creo que esta es la bebida equivocada.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L15-01 - E2151 - Ethan - Excuse me, I think this is the wrong drink.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L20-04 - E2204 - Mia - Should I boil the water.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-01 - E2221 - Mr. Carter - You should drink more water.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-02 - E2222 - Noah - Should I stop eating snacks.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: You shouldn't eat too many sugary snacks.
items.translation: No deberías comer demasiadas botanas azucaradas.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-03 - E2223 - Mr. Carter - You shouldn't eat too many sugary snacks.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: And we need enough food for two days.
items.translation: Y necesitamos suficiente comida para dos días.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L32-06 - E2326 - Mia - And we need enough food for two days.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: We could grab something to eat.
items.translation: Podríamos ir por algo de comer.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L12-05 - BR1125 - Ben - We could grab something to eat.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: There's a new food market downtown.
items.translation: Hay un mercado de comida nuevo en el centro.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L13-03 - BR1133 - Ben - There's a new food market downtown.mp3
